title: Page Builder

fields.label: Content Sections
fields.name: cms
fields.instructions: Build your page by adding and arranging content sections below. Each section is a modular layout component that you can customize independently. Drag sections to reorder them, and use the collapse/expand controls to manage your workspace efficiently. Note: When using the Page Builder, the standard WordPress content editor is hidden and the 'Show Page Title' setting in the sidebar is ignored.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Small label above the hero title.

sub_fields.label: Title Lines
sub_fields.name: title_lines
sub_fields.instructions: Add one row per visual title line. Inside each line, add one or more parts and highlight only the words that need the accent color.

sub_fields.label: Line Parts
sub_fields.name: line_parts
sub_fields.instructions: Add each inline text segment separately. Toggle Highlight for accent words.

sub_fields.label: Highlight
sub_fields.name: highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Use accent color for this text part.

sub_fields.label: Description

sub_fields.instructions: Short hero body copy.

sub_fields.name: buttons
sub_fields.instructions: Primary and secondary hero buttons.

sub_fields.label: Feature Chips
sub_fields.name: features
sub_fields.instructions: Small finance category chips shown under the buttons.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Upload an SVG icon for this chip.

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: media_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the hero background uses an image or video.

sub_fields.label: Hero Image

sub_fields.instructions: Optional mobile-specific hero background image.

sub_fields.name: video

sub_fields.label: Video File
sub_fields.name: video_self_host_file
sub_fields.instructions: Upload MP4 or WebM video file.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Short intro copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Product Source
sub_fields.name: product_source
sub_fields.instructions: Show all published Finance Products or manually select specific products.

sub_fields.label: Selected Products
sub_fields.name: selected_products
sub_fields.instructions: Choose products and drag to set their display order.

sub_fields.label: Number of Products
sub_fields.name: posts_per_page
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Product Source is All Products. Leave empty to show all.

sub_fields.label: Grid Columns
sub_fields.name: columns
sub_fields.instructions: Uses existing card-grid column utility classes.

sub_fields.label: Order By
sub_fields.name: orderby
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Product Source is All Products.

sub_fields.label: Order
sub_fields.name: order
sub_fields.instructions: Used when Product Source is All Products.

sub_fields.label: Title Lines
sub_fields.name: title_lines
sub_fields.instructions: Add one row per visual title line. Inside each line, add one or more parts and highlight only the words that need the accent color.

sub_fields.label: Line Parts

sub_fields.instructions: Add each inline text segment separately. Toggle Highlight for accent words.

sub_fields.label: Highlight
sub_fields.name: highlight
sub_fields.instructions: Use accent color for this text part.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Body copy shown below the heading.

sub_fields.label: Chips
sub_fields.name: chips
sub_fields.instructions: Label pills shown below the body copy (e.g. broker types). Link is optional — leave empty for a plain label, add a URL to make it clickable.

sub_fields.label: Image Position
sub_fields.name: media_position
sub_fields.instructions: Choose which side the media appears on.

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: media_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether this section uses an image or video.

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: video
sub_fields.instructions: Video media for this section.

sub_fields.label: Behavior
sub_fields.name: video_behavior
sub_fields.instructions: How the video plays. Autoplay = muted looping background video that pauses when off-screen. Hover = plays while the mouse is over it, resets on leave. Onclick Popup = shows a play button and opens the video in a lightbox (sound allowed).

sub_fields.label: Autoplay
sub_fields.name: video_autoplay
sub_fields.instructions: Start playing as soon as the section loads. Browsers force it to be muted. (Autoplay behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Autoplay On Scroll
sub_fields.name: video_autoplay_on_scroll
sub_fields.instructions: Only start when the video scrolls into view (50% visible) and pause when it leaves. (Autoplay behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Controls
sub_fields.name: video_controls
sub_fields.instructions: Show the custom play/pause and mute buttons overlaid on the video. (Autoplay behavior, not available for YouTube.)

sub_fields.label: Muted
sub_fields.name: video_muted
sub_fields.instructions: Mute the audio. Note: Autoplay and Hover are always muted by the browser regardless of this setting.

sub_fields.label: Loop
sub_fields.name: video_loop
sub_fields.instructions: Automatically restart the video from the beginning when it ends.

sub_fields.label: Popup Autoplay
sub_fields.name: video_popup_autoplay
sub_fields.instructions: Start playing automatically when the popup opens. (Onclick Popup behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Popup Controls
sub_fields.name: video_popup_controls
sub_fields.instructions: Show the native video controls inside the popup. (Onclick Popup behavior only.)

sub_fields.label: Stats
sub_fields.name: stats
sub_fields.instructions: Add each metric shown in the stats band.

sub_fields.label: Content Source
sub_fields.name: content_source
sub_fields.instructions: Choose where this CTA's content comes from. "Global" uses the shared CTA managed in Site Settings → Global CTA (recommended — update it once and every Global CTA across the site changes). "Custom" lets you write content just for this page.

sub_fields.message: The fields below only apply when **Content Source** is set to **Custom**. Leave Content Source on **Global** to use the shared CTA from Site Settings.

description: Flexible content page builder for creating custom page layouts. Build pages using modular, reusable content sections that can be arranged in any order to create unique page designs.
